required_setting_or_evidence: WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL use https, proxy TLS is valid
pass_signal: Editor, OAuth callbacks, and webhooks use HTTPS
fail_signal: Any public URL uses http or localhost

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_PROXY_HOPS matches actual proxy chain
pass_signal: n8n generates correct public URLs and reads forwarded headers correctly
fail_signal: Redirects, webhook URLs, or client IP handling are wrong

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_SECURE_COOKIE=true
pass_signal: Session cookies are HTTPS-only
fail_signal: Secure cookie disabled on public instance

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_SAMESITE_COOKIE=lax or stricter unless integration requires none
pass_signal: Cookie cross-site behavior is intentional
fail_signal: Cookie policy is unknown or too permissive

required_setting_or_evidence: Owner has separate member-level account for daily workflow editing
pass_signal: Owner account not used for ordinary workflow work
fail_signal: Owner edits daily workflows and can overwrite others

required_setting_or_evidence: Monthly review of active, pending, and removed users
pass_signal: Former users removed and workflows or credentials transferred or deleted
fail_signal: Former users remain active or data ownership is unclear

control: SMTP for invites and password resets
required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_EMAIL_MODE=smtp, N8N_SMTP_HOST, N8N_SMTP_SENDER, SSL or STARTTLS configured
pass_signal: Invites and password resets work without manual link sharing
fail_signal: Users cannot reset passwords or invite links are copied manually

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_INVITE_LINKS_EMAIL_ONLY=true
pass_signal: Invite links delivered by email only
fail_signal: Invite URLs can be retrieved programmatically

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_MFA_ENABLED=true
pass_signal: Users can enable MFA and policy says who must use it
fail_signal: MFA disabled on a public instance

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_MFA_ENFORCED_ENABLED=true with N8N_SECURITY_POLICY_MANAGED_BY_ENV=true when policy management is available
pass_signal: All users are required to use MFA
fail_signal: MFA is optional for privileged users

required_setting_or_evidence: SAML or OIDC configured on Business or Enterprise plan
pass_signal: Login lifecycle aligns with identity provider
fail_signal: Local accounts drift from company offboarding

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY fixed, backed up, and access-controlled
pass_signal: Credentials remain decryptable after restart and restore
fail_signal: Key is generated implicitly or not backed up

required_setting_or_evidence: Enterprise deployments use 1Password, AWS Secrets Manager, Azure Key Vault, GCP Secret Manager, or HashiCorp Vault where appropriate
pass_signal: Secrets are centrally scoped and rotated
fail_signal: Secrets are copied into workflow text or broad env vars

control: Block env access in workflow code
required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=true
pass_signal: Code node and expressions cannot freely read environment variables
fail_signal: Workflow users can inspect env secrets

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_BLOCK_FILE_ACCESS_TO_N8N_FILES=true and N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO set where needed
pass_signal: Workflow file access is constrained
fail_signal: Workflow can read arbitrary sensitive files

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_SSRF_PROTECTION_ENABLED=true and blocked ranges include default
pass_signal: HTTP-capable nodes cannot reach private or metadata ranges unless allowed
fail_signal: Workflows can query internal networks or metadata services

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_PUBLIC_API_DISABLED=true when API is not required
pass_signal: Unused API surface is closed
fail_signal: Public API remains enabled without owner

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_PUBLIC_API_SWAGGERUI_DISABLED=true when not needed
pass_signal: Interactive API docs are not exposed publicly
fail_signal: Playground is exposed on public instance

required_setting_or_evidence: NODES_EXCLUDE includes executeCommand and other organization-risky nodes
pass_signal: Users cannot add blocked host-level nodes
fail_signal: Untrusted users can execute host commands or risky local file operations

required_setting_or_evidence: N8N_COMMUNITY_PACKAGES_ENABLED=false or N8N_UNVERIFIED_PACKAGES_ENABLED=false unless explicitly governed
pass_signal: Community node risk is consciously accepted and logged
fail_signal: Unverified npm code can be installed without review

required_setting_or_evidence: n8n audit runs after hardening changes and at least monthly
pass_signal: Findings for credentials, database, filesystem, nodes, and instance are tracked
fail_signal: Outdated instance or unprotected webhooks go unnoticed

required_setting_or_evidence: Redaction and execution retention are configured for sensitive workflows
pass_signal: Sensitive payloads are not retained longer than needed
fail_signal: Execution history becomes a sensitive data warehouse

required_setting_or_evidence: Random paths, shared secret, provider signature, HMAC, or rate limit exists for public webhooks
pass_signal: Public webhook cannot be trivially guessed or abused
fail_signal: Webhook path is simple and unauthenticated

control: Backup and restore before security changes
required_setting_or_evidence: Week 14 backup and restore drill pass before public instance upgrade
pass_signal: Rollback and full restore are available
fail_signal: Security patch can break production without recovery path

required_setting_or_evidence: Weekly release note triage, critical 24-48h, high 7 days, routine 30 days
pass_signal: Public instance remains inside update SLA
fail_signal: Instance remains outdated with no recorded mitigation

required_setting_or_evidence: HTTP 5xx, failed executions, restarts, audit findings, and login anomalies are reviewed
pass_signal: Incidents become visible quickly
fail_signal: Security and runtime failures are discovered by users
